takes.take: The 2025-26 Knicks sweep the 73-9 Warriors and honestly it's only close for a half.
Prime Steph Curry doesn't start over Jalen Brunson. He comes off the bench for spacing.
The Nets are the best team in New Jersey.
Boston has 18 banners and none of them came back from 29 down in the Finals. Quantity over quality.
Reggie Miller needed 9 seconds to score 8 points. Brunson needed one January slump to win a whole championship. Efficiency.
The 'Heat Culture' is just Knicks culture with worse pizza.
MJ never dropped 45 in a road closeout game at age 29 as a second-round pick. Brunson did. Just stating facts and leaving.
KAT is the best shooting big man of all time and Dirk fans need to hear it from someone who loves them.
Dallas had Brunson AND Dončić and chose vibes. The 2026 banner is technically a Mavs front office achievement.
The Spurs got a top-tier Finals experience in 2026 and should be thanking New York for the memories.
Victor Wembanyama will win many titles. Starting whenever the Knicks are done. So, check back later.
LeBron's best career decision was never playing for the Knicks, he knew the Garden spotlight was too bright.
The Lakers have 17 rings and none of them required surviving the MTA on game night. Difficulty multiplier says Knicks 3 > Lakers 17.
Ewing never won a ring because the basketball gods were saving all of it for 2026. It was a savings account, not a drought.
The 8-second violation should be renamed the Reggie Rule and the Pacers should apologize annually.
The NBA Cup only became a real trophy the moment the Knicks won it. Before that it was a group project.
Madison Square Garden is the only arena that would sell out for a scrimmage. Your team's arena has a tarp section.
The 90s Bulls only look good because they never had to play the 2026 Knicks.
Philly fans boo their own draft picks. Knicks fans sold out 17 straight lottery seasons. We are not the same.
Every 'greatest Finals performance ever' list that doesn't start with Brunson's Game 5 is legally considered fan fiction.
The Cavs got swept by the Knicks in the 2026 East finals and Cleveland fans called it 'a rebuilding year.' It was May.
OKC won 60+ games in 2025-26 and the basketball world's response was 'cool, anyway, have you seen the Knicks?'
Bing Bong is a more culturally significant phrase than anything ever chanted in Boston.
Timothée Chalamet has more Finals wins as a fan (1) than the Nets have as a franchise (0).
Mike Brown got fired by Sacramento and won a chip 18 months later. The Kings remain the NBA's most generous charity.
